canonical_answer: A white Range Rover with black lettering sits beside a black metal fence outdoors. Inside the vehicle, a beige center console armrest is positioned between the front seats. A person wearing a blue protective suit and gloves leans over the console. The individual lifts the armrest lid to expose a dark storage compartment. Yellow and white text overlays remain visible in the top left corner.
